name: Claude Code Router - LLM Provider Proxy
description: Installs claude-code-router daemon for routing Claude Code API calls to alternate LLM providers (DeepSeek, Gemini, OpenRouter, Anthropic)

version.description: claude-code-router version to use (e.g., 'latest', '1.0.0', 'none' to skip)

shells.description: Which shells to configure (bash, zsh, or both)

autostart.description: Auto-start the router daemon on container start
